name: Bone Conduction Wireless Headphones Black - heyday™
description:
Experience open-ear listening with the Bone Conduction Wireless Headphones Black from heyday™. These headphones feature true wireless technology and a built-in microphone for seamless connectivity and communication. The ear cushions are made from silicone, ensuring a secure fit. With a USB-C connection type, these headphones are easy to charge and use.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
